description.value: **Benefit:** When at least one ally who also has this feat is threatening a foe, you gain a +4 circumstance bonus against that foe on Bluff checks to feint, Bluff checks to create a diversion to hide, and Acrobatics checks to move through that foe’s threatened squares. You also gain a +2 circumstance bonus on steal and dirty trick combat maneuver checks made against that foe.
